articles.description: Striker Benjamin Sesko and goalkeeper Senne Lammens are the key figures as Manchester United gain a hugely valuable Premier League win at Everton.
articles.title: Benjamin Sesko and Senne Lammens give Man Utd real hope of Champions League return

articles.description: Boxing greats Manny Pacquiao and Floyd Mayweather agree a professional rematch at Sphere in Las Vegas in September.
articles.title: Boxing greats Manny Pacquiao and Floyd Mayweather agree rematch

articles.description: England's downturn in form has been steep and sudden. Why has their Six Nations campaign turned from Grand Slam dreams to a salvage job?
articles.title: England: Five reasons for Six Nations slide

articles.description: Italian cricket is in crisis days after the country's World Cup debut as it deals with an allegation of sexual assault by a senior figure within the national governing body.
articles.title: Italy cricket in crisis over alleged sexual assault by senior figure at national governing body

articles.description: Lindsey Vonn says she nearly lost her leg from the injuries she sustained in a heavy crash at the Winter Olympics - and thanks the doctor who saved her from an amputation.
articles.title: Lindsey Vonn credits doctor who 'saved her leg' after huge crash

articles.description: BBC Sport explores the unfolding security situation in Mexico and the potential impact on this summer's World Cup.
articles.title: Mexico cartel violence: Could Fifa World Cup hosting be compromised?

articles.description: Spanish giants Barcelona have signed 16-year-old Norwich City academy prospect Ajay Tavares, who has played for England age-group teams.
articles.title: Ajay Tavares: Barcelona sign Norwich City academy prospect

articles.description: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?
articles.title: Troy Deeney's Team of the Week: Gyokeres, Jimenez, Eze, Van Dijk, Gomez, Fleming, Hall

articles.description: Olympic champion Keely Hodgkinson says she feels "closer than ever" to breaking the women's 800m outdoor record - the longest-standing world record in athletics.
articles.title: Keely Hodgkinson 'closer than ever' to breaking athletics' longest standing world record

articles.description: British number one Jack Draper marks his post-injury return to action on the ATP Tour with a straight-set win over Frenchman Quentin Halys at the Dubai Tennis Championships.
articles.title: Jack Draper: British number one makes winning return to ATP Tour
